retired_discovery_paths.reason: project-local skills.config filtering is not honored by the current Codex runtime; removal prevents duplicate discovery

scope: make the packaged plugin skill the single source and installed runtime owner
retire the project-local discoverable SKILL.md while retaining the evaluation harness and protocol parity guards
preserve exact approval, multi-agent pending-state, implementation-path, and overage behavior
restore the core skill body to at most 1500 NFC Unicode codepoints while retaining acceptance closure
keep automatic recording, hooks, MCP, marketplace edits, and installed-cache edits out of scope

failures: E32:negative_quick loaded the skill body and verification protocol
E32:standard_cross_file loaded governance plus verification above the standard budget

activation.approval_scope: P1, P2, and P3 implementation, validation, plugin update, and acceptance
invalidation_conditions: base commit, active target hash, or retired discovery path changes before activation
candidate, patch, target list, or scope changes
preflight or required current-model evidence is missing or regresses
evaluation helper or protocol mirrors differ from the package after activation
fresh-task evidence still lists the project authoring skill as active
approval refers to a different target or scope
